title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.371 - Right to distribution, remedies
text:
359.371.  Right to distribution, remedies. — At the time a partner becomes entitled to receive a distribution, he has the status of, and is entitled to all remedies available to, a creditor of the limited partnership with respect to the distribution.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650) 
Effective 1-01-87
